title: HPOM-003b: No-self-review gate in SQLite claim layer
description: TASK-036 covered no-self-review at review time (validate_review.py). This task adds the SQLite claim-time gate: when an agent claims a review task, db/claims.py must check that the claiming agent is not the same as the task owner. For high-risk tasks, optionally require a different model_family field. Add tests.
acceptance_criteria: claim_task fails when reviewer agent_id matches task owner in SQLite
error is distinguishable from other claim failures (returns False with logged reason, or raises ClaimError)
tests cover: same agent blocked, different agent allowed
